case_title: RONALD A MUNGAI VS. SIGNATURE TRANSPORTATION COMPANY,A CALIFORNIA CORP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNGAI, RONALD A AS TO DEFENDANT SIGNATURE TRANSPORTATION COMPANY,A CALIFORNIA CORP ORATION DBA CONNOISSEUR LIMOUSINE SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY FILING FEES BY STATE OF CA
